---
title: "CV"
description: "Cole Rehbein — crisis counselor, psychology researcher, and writer. Academic and clinical CV."
page-layout: article
code-tools: false
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="terminal-window-large">
  <div class="terminal-header-bar">
    <span class="terminal-dot red"></span>
    <span class="terminal-dot yellow"></span>
    <span class="terminal-dot green"></span>
    <code>cole@press:~$ cat ~/cv.md</code>
  </div>
  <div class="terminal-body terminal-prose">

    <h2>Cole Rehbein</h2>
    <p class="terminal-subtitle-text">Crisis Counselor &amp; Psychology Researcher · Albuquerque, New Mexico</p>

    <hr class="terminal-hr">

    <h3>Clinical Experience</h3>

    <p><strong>Crisis Counselor</strong> — 988 Suicide &amp; Crisis Lifeline</p>
    <p><em>Friday–Monday, 2:00 PM–11:00 PM MT</em></p>
    <ul>
      <li>High-acuity, short-duration crisis intervention</li>
      <li>Modalities: ACT, behavioral activation, functional analysis of verbal behavior</li>
      <li>Populations: crisis callers, SMI, depression, ADHD</li>
      <li>Languages: English, Spanish (B1)</li>
    </ul>

    <hr class="terminal-hr">

    <h3>Education</h3>

    <p><strong>Master's Program</strong> — Clinical Psychology</p>
    <p><em>Thesis: Outdoor mindfulness-based behavioral activation for depression</em></p>
    <ul>
      <li>Longitudinal design, psychometric analysis</li>
      <li>Tools: R, SPSS, Qualtrics</li>
    </ul>

    <p><strong>B.A., Philosophy</strong> — St. John's College (Great Books Program)</p>
    <ul>
      <li>Focus: Spinoza, ethics, philosophy of mind</li>
      <li>Ancient Greek (reading), French (reading)</li>
      <li>Close reading, Socratic dialogue</li>
    </ul>

    <hr class="terminal-hr">

    <h3>Research</h3>

    <p><strong>Thesis:</strong> Mindfulness-based behavioral activation for depression</p>
    <ul>
      <li>Data collection: complete</li>
      <li>Analysis: complete</li>
      <li>Writing: in progress</li>
    </ul>
    <p><strong>Methods:</strong> Psychological assessment, EEG, statistical analysis</p>

    <hr class="terminal-hr">

    <h3>Journalism</h3>
    <ul>
      <li>City reporter, copyeditor, culture writer</li>
      <li>Beats: local politics, food, arts</li>
    </ul>

    <hr class="terminal-hr">

    <h3>Technical Skills</h3>
    <ul>
      <li><strong>Languages:</strong> R, Python, LaTeX, Markdown</li>
      <li><strong>Tools:</strong> Quarto, SPSS, Qualtrics, Git</li>
      <li><strong>Publishing:</strong> Academic papers, research reports, technical documentation</li>
    </ul>

    <hr class="terminal-hr">

    <h3>Contact</h3>
    <p><a href="mailto:cole@cole.press">cole@cole.press</a></p>
    <p><a href="https://github.com/colerehbein" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">GitHub</a></p>

  </div>
</div>
```
